About Photo

🐾
Our Story

A family that lives and breathes pets.

Fresh Pets Day Spa is a family-owned salon located at 19 W Baseline Rd in Phoenix. We groom dogs and cats of all breeds — from a quick nail trim to a full spa day.

We offer 1-on-1 straight-through grooming — your pet is never caged or left waiting. Specialists in high anxiety and senior pups.

Bilingual team — 1-on-1 Grooming. We believe every pet parent deserves to feel comfortable and understood.

🐶 Dogs & Cats
✂️ All Breeds
📸 1-on-1 Grooming

🚪 Walk-ins Welcome

A spa experience — your pet deserves.

Near Trader Joe's in Ahwatukee · Natural products only

Book Spa Day →
What We Offer

Every service tailored
to your pet's needs.

From a quick bath to a full spa day — we've got your fur baby covered.

🛁
Full Groom

Complete grooming from bath to trim, breed-specific styling, blowout, and finishing touches. Your pet leaves looking and smelling amazing.

🚿
Bath & Brush

Deep cleansing bath, blow-dry, brushout, ear cleaning, and a spritz of pet-safe perfume. Perfect for a quick refresh.

✂️
Haircut & Trim

Breed-standard or custom cuts. We shape, scissor, and style to suit your pet's unique look and your preferences.

💅
Nail Trim

Quick, safe nail trimming and filing. Calm, gentle handling — even for the most anxious pets.

🐱
Cat Grooming

We love cats too! Full grooming, bath, deshedding, and nail trim for your feline friends — handled with extra patience.

✨
De-Shedding

Specialized treatment to reduce shedding up to 80%. Perfect for huskies, labs, golden retrievers, and double-coat breeds.
